heading: Tonight
text: A stray shower, then clearing. More clouds south late.
temperature: 30s to near 40, 30, frosty in cold spots

heading: Saturday
text: Showers south -; chance north -Mid 50s to lower 60s

heading: Sunday
text: Scattered showers, diminishing in the afternoon.
temperature: Upper 50s to mid 60s north, mid to upper 60s south

heading: Monday
text: Variable clouds and sun. Chance of a shower.
